DATABASE_URL.description: Supabase pooler URL (same value used in Render and GitHub Actions).

CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN.description: Generate locally with `claude setup-token`. Used by `claude -p` in the watchdog reasoning step.

R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: Cloudflare R2 access key id (Phase 4 two-tier storage: Parquet history in R2). See HANDOFF.md.

R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: Cloudflare R2 secret access key (shown once at token creation).

R2_BUCKET.description: Cloudflare R2 bucket name, e.g. edgefinder-data.
